Title: Report metrics query layer
Status: Done

Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-BE-710
Epic: CMP-E7: Reporting and Export
---

As a stakeholder
I want consistent metrics definitions so report numbers are trustworthy.
So status updates do not require manual reconciliation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Metrics definitions match PRD section 13 semantics.
- [ ] Date-range and campaign filters are supported.
- [ ] Metrics include created/submitted/approved/claimed/posted/missed/unclaimed/waiting-review.
- [ ] Groupings include by user, campaign, topic.
- [ ] Query outputs are permission-scoped.
